hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | while read -r f; do case "$f" in *.go) pkg=$(dirname "$f" | sed "s|$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/||"); cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && go test "./$pkg" 2>&1 | tail -10;; esac; done || true

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [ -n "$f" ] && echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(env|pem|key|crt)$|/credentials|/secret'; then echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Editing credential/sensitive files requires manual review","hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Credential and sensitive files must be edited manually"}}'; exit 1; fi
